schema.A_declared_status: verbatim or normalized M6 status as declared in the source
schema.B_declared_evidence: evidence the source cites for its declared status
schema.C_aeal_or_anchor: AEAL claim citation or bridge SHA anchor that backs the declaration; null if none
schema.D_timestamp: source mtime or in-document declared timestamp
